Agent ran git commit --amend + git push --force-with-lease without emitting PRE-COMMIT GATE PASSED block in same turn — bypassed mandatory user diff-approval gate per pre-commit.md/panel-policy.md §User diff-approval. Copilot reviewer flagged

timestamp: eadonly+out field as compile error inside class ctor — false positive: C# permits assignment via out inside declaring class instance ctor (ECMA-334 §15.5.3). Catalog hardened with FP-3 entry
finding_brief: catalog-updated

Agent went straight from pre-impl panel READY (4-slot R4.2 unanimous) to git commit + git push without running the post-implementation multi-model review (post-code-change.md step 3) or emitting the POST-CODE-CHANGE LEDGER block; user prompted "you skipped the pre commit review" after push; a retroactive single-agent code-review caught one MEDIUM asymmetry (callback exception handling missing in RemoveDatabaseAsync that was present in ResolveImportConflictsAsync) that the design panel could not see because it reviews specs not implementations. THIRD occurrence of pre-commit-gate bypass in this series (after pre-commit-gate-bypass-on-amend in PR 6 and another silent skip earlier).

Interface XML summary stayed narrow after the interface was extended with new members (ILogReloadCoordinator gained HasActiveLogs + ReloadAllActiveLogsAsync; summary still described only database-removal orchestration). Panel (4 reviewers + 11-cat prompt incl. category 5 Documentation accuracy) missed it; Copilot reviewer flagged it on first push. Pattern: interface-extension XML doc staleness.

Extracted helper method inherited a comment that described the ORIGINAL site's adjacent operations (_disposed check + dispatcher call) but the extracted body has only the dispatcher call. Panel (post-impl + §2D) missed it across two rounds; Copilot caught it in PR round 4. Pattern: extraction-comment-drift.

Copilot PR review flagged RemoveDatabaseAsync entry-CT-check missing (round 5); same pattern shape also present at ImportAsync + ApplyPendingTogglesAsync (sister sites) but our panel + reviewer caught only the bot-cited site initially. Self-similarity sweep on the fix round was mandated only after the user pushed back. Pattern: bot flagged 1 instance of a recurring shape; sister sites stayed unfixed across multiple amend rounds because no explicit self-similarity sweep happens in the bot-fix workflow. THIRD recurrence of incomplete-sweep failure in this PR (round 2: UpgradeDatabaseAsync; round 5: ImportAsync + ApplyPendingTogglesAsync).

confirmRemoveAsync declared as nullable optional (Func<...>? = null) with null-default semantic = silent refusal (return NotConfirmed without invoking RemoveAsync). Asymmetric with askOverwriteAsync (null → skip-conflicts → still proceeds). Panel (4-slot pre-impl + 4-slot post-impl + 4-slot §2D mirror) all missed despite category 10 in the 11-cat prompt covering ambiguous boolean params + magic-number defaults. Bot caught it round 6. Fix: made confirmRemoveAsync required (drop = null + add ArgumentNullException.ThrowIfNull at entry). Pattern catalog updated with explicit slug.

XML summary fix applied in round 3 (commit 2a18ecce) was silently LOST during subsequent amend chain; user pushback in round 5 led to re-adding it; then it was lost AGAIN in round 6 commit 3a8ddd8d before a focused code-review caught it. Pattern: working-tree edit makes it into the agent diff view but does not make it into the next git commit object. THREE recurrences in this PR (rounds 3-4 transition + rounds 5-6 transition + round 6 self-similarity sweep regression). Likely cause: edit tool returns success but file write does not persist OR git add silently fails for some path. Mitigation added: pre-commit.md hard gate now requires staged_diff_verified field cross-checking git diff --cached against the shown-diff before the commit can proceed.
AddEventLogRuntime DI registration extension method has XML <summary> documenting required external registrations (AddFluxor
proposed_catalog_slug: AddEventLogProviderDatabase) but the doc was not updated when PR 8 added DatabaseOperationCoordinator singleton (which depends on host-provided IFilePickerService). Downstream hosts get DI activation failure at runtime when Settings opens. Panel (4-slot pre-impl + 4-slot post-impl + 4-slot §2D mirror + 2 single-agent code-reviews) all missed despite a previously-strengthened doc-impl-mismatch interface-extension sub-case. Bot caught it round 7. Pattern: stale DI-registration-method contract doc after adding a new singleton with host-provided dependency.
